common.hot_reload_hint: Run hot-reload in Maintenance for changes to take effect

location.title: Location
location.description: Used by Kåre for weather, time and geographic context. Never hardcoded — stored in configs/settings.yaml.

city.label: City
city.hint: Name of the place you live

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language for the admin GUI and what language Kåre responds in. Takes effect immediately.
language.gui_hint: Controls the language of this administration interface
language.kare_hint: Controls the language of Kåre's responses

gateway.title: HA Gateway
gateway.description: Kåre's HA bridge (kaare_ha_gateway.py) — executes smart home commands. URL stored in configs/services.yaml.
gateway.timeout_hint: Max wait time per HA call

token.title: Home Assistant Token
token.description: Long-lived access token. Stored in configs/ha_token.env — not in code.
token.new_hint: Paste token from HA → Profile → Security → Long-lived tokens

advanced.title: HA Gateway — Advanced Settings
advanced.description: Timeout, log URL and security list of allowed HA actions. Stored in configs/kare_ha.env.
advanced.log_url_hint: Endpoint Kåre receives HA logs on

card.title: MQTT
card.description: Used for Frigate events and smart home events. Stored in configs/services.yaml and configs/mqtt.env.
card.host_hint: IP or hostname of the MQTT broker (e.g. Home Assistant)
card.password_hint: Leave field empty to keep existing password.
card.tls_hint: Enable encrypted connection (port 8883). Requires broker to support TLS.
card.topic_hint: Frigate prefix for MQTT subscription. Default: frigate (listens on frigate/events).
card.client_hint: Unique MQTT client ID. Leave empty for auto-generated ID.
card.reconnect_hint: Seconds to wait between reconnection attempts on disconnect.

vpn.title: WireGuard VPN
vpn.description: Endpoint that VPN clients connect to. Stored in configs/settings.yaml.
vpn.host_hint: Your DuckDNS domain (e.g. my-name.duckdns.org). Leave empty if VPN is not configured.

llm.description: One section per LLM role. Stored in configs/llm.yaml. Restart the affected service after changes.
llm.ctx_warning: All calls to the same Ollama instance MUST use identical num_ctx — mismatch forces full model reload (~3.5 min).
llm.api_key_unset_hint: Not set — required for this provider
llm.think_hint_vllm: Enables reasoning. Shown in the reasoning field from vLLM.
llm.timeout_hint: Max wait time. Empty = no limit.
llm.model_hint: Model name used by this role (stored in configs/models.yaml)
llm.gen_model_hint: Model for generating images from text (stored in configs/models.yaml)
llm.edit_model_hint: Model for editing existing images (stored in configs/models.yaml)
llm.image_provider_hint: What type of image generation service
llm.image_timeout_hint: Max wait time per image generation. Empty = no limit.
llm.vllm_docker_params: vLLM Docker parameters — requires container restart to take effect
llm.ctx_locked_hint: Locked — shared with {{shared}}. Change there to adjust.
llm.role_fallback_desc: Step 2 of 3 — activated if 27B fails, cloud LLM is last resort
llm.share_with_active_note: Mechanic shares model and settings with Miss Kåre. Edit in the Miss Kåre card. Requires restart of kaare-agents to take effect.

num_ctx.label: Context window
num_ctx.hint: Tokens the LLM can remember (e.g. 65536). All calls to the same model MUST use identical value.

num_predict.label: Max tokens out
num_predict.hint: Max tokens in reply (e.g. 8192). Set low for fast agents.

max_model_len.label: Max context length
max_model_len.hint: max_model_len: max tokens the model can process (e.g. 32768).

gpu_memory_utilization.label: GPU memory utilization
gpu_memory_utilization.hint: gpu_memory_utilization: 0.0–1.0. 0.97 = recommended for Blackwell with FP8.

kv_cache_dtype.label: KV-cache dtype
kv_cache_dtype.hint: kv_cache_dtype: fp8 halves KV-cache size. fp16 = full precision. auto = let vLLM decide.

max_num_seqs.label: Max parallel sequences
max_num_seqs.hint: max_num_seqs: number of concurrent requests. 2 = recommended for single user (gives compact CUDA graphs).

llm.manage_section_hint: Download models and configure GPU for this instance
llm.manage_gpu_hint: Which GPU this Ollama instance runs on. Takes effect on next docker compose restart.
llm.manage_gpu_restart_note: GPU change takes effect on next docker compose restart
llm.manage_pull_hint: Copy the model name from ollama.com and paste it here
llm.manage_num_threads_hint: Number of CPU threads Ollama uses. Empty = automatic (all cores). Takes effect on docker compose restart.
llm.manage_num_parallel_hint: Concurrent requests per instance. Default: 1. Higher improves throughput but uses more VRAM.
llm.manage_max_loaded_hint: Models kept in VRAM simultaneously. Default: 1. Increase if the instance serves multiple agents with different models.
llm.manage_kv_cache_hint: f16 = full precision. q8_0 = halves KV-cache size. q4_0 = quarter, frees most VRAM.
llm.manage_flash_attn_hint: Faster inference and lower memory usage. Requires compatible GPU setup. Recommended to enable.
llm.warmup_error: Failed to load model into VRAM
llm.warmup_cpu_warning: Model running on CPU — restart the container to load into VRAM
llm.keep_warm_hint: Model stays loaded in VRAM at all times. Disable to let Ollama manage memory itself (unloads after 5 min idle).
llm.docker_control_hint: Enables container restart buttons for Ollama roles. Requires /var/run/docker.sock to be mounted.
llm.container_name_hint: The container name running this Ollama instance (e.g. ollama-agents)
llm.container_discover: Search for containers on this port
llm.container_name_required: Set container name to enable restart

weather.title: Weather provider
weather.description: Which service Kåre uses to fetch weather data. Location is configured in the General tab. Stored in configs/settings.yaml and configs/weather.env.
weather.provider_hint: Choose weather API. met.no and Open-Meteo are free and require no key.
weather.days_hint: Number of days ahead Kåre shows (1–7). Today counts as day 1.
weather.needs_key_warning: This provider requires an API key. Without a key Kåre will return an error for weather requests.
weather.feels_like_hint: Shows feels-like temperature in addition to actual temperature (all providers).
weather.uv_hint: Shows max UV index per day (Open-Meteo only).
weather.sun_hint: Shows sunrise and sunset times per day (all providers; OWM today only).
weather.alerts_hint: Shows active weather alerts from met.no (yellow/orange/red/extreme). met.no provider only.
weather.ha_sensors_hint: Fetches current readings from outdoor sensors in Home Assistant, shown before the forecast. Find entity IDs in HA → Settings → Devices & Services.
weather.ha_temp_hint: Entity ID for outdoor temperature sensor.
weather.ha_wind_hint: Entity ID for wind speed sensor (m/s or km/h).
weather.ha_wind_gust_hint: Entity ID for wind gust sensor. Shown in parentheses after the wind speed.
weather.ha_wind_dir_hint: Entity ID for wind direction sensor. Can return a compass abbreviation (e.g. SW) or degrees (0–360).
weather.ha_precip_hint: Entity ID for current precipitation rate (mm/h).
weather.ha_precip_last_hour_hint: Entity ID for accumulated precipitation in the last hour (mm).
weather.ha_precip_today_hint: Entity ID for accumulated precipitation since midnight (mm).
weather.ha_humidity_hint: Entity ID for outdoor relative humidity sensor (%).
weather.ha_pressure_hint: Entity ID for atmospheric pressure sensor (hPa).
weather.air_quality_hint: Shows AQI and key pollution parameters (PM2.5, PM10, NO₂, O₃). Supported by: met.no (Norway only), Open-Meteo, OpenWeatherMap and WeatherAPI. Not available for PirateWeather.
weather.tides_hint: Shows high/low tides per day. Kartverket (free, Norwegian coast) or Stormglass (global, API key required).
weather.tide_provider_hint: auto = Kartverket if on Norwegian coast, otherwise Stormglass. Kartverket is always free and requires no key.
weather.stormglass_key_unset_hint: Not set — free key at stormglass.io (10 req/day). Required for tides outside Norway.
weather.camera_weather_label: Use camera to see the weather
weather.camera_weather_hint: Takes a snapshot from a Frigate camera and uses AI to describe the visible weather conditions. Requires Frigate to be running and the camera pointing at the sky.
weather.camera_name_hint: Frigate API name of the camera (same name used in the camera tool, e.g. roof_camera).

websearch.title: Web search
websearch.description: Choose search provider. DDG requires no configuration and is the default. SearXNG requires a running instance. Brave requires an API key. Stored in configs/services.yaml.
websearch.provider_hint: Primary search provider. DDG works without a key.
websearch.fallback_hint: Used automatically if the primary provider fails or returns 0 results.
websearch.searxng_url_hint: URL to your SearXNG instance (e.g. http://localhost:8888).
websearch.fetch_count_hint: Total number of results to request from provider
websearch.max_results_hint: Max number of URLs fetched and sent to Miss Library
websearch.content_max_hint: Number of characters fetched from each website
websearch.brave_key_unset_hint: Not set — only required if Brave is chosen as provider
websearch.hot_reload_hint: Run hot-reload in Maintenance for changes to take effect

trusted.title: Whitelisted websites
trusted.description: Only these domains are used when Kåre searches for information online. Stored in configs/trusted_sources.yaml. Requires hot-reload to activate.
trusted.hot_reload_hint: Changes to whitelisted websites take effect by running 'Hot-reload' in the Maintenance tab.

refleksjon.title: Kåre reflection
refleksjon.description: Kåre regularly reads Jang's distilled thoughts and considers whether something should be written in the self-image or on the notepad. The reflection runs silently in the background — no user output, no TTS. Pauses automatically during night meetings. Stored in configs/settings.yaml.
refleksjon.enabled_hint: Turn off to stop the reflection cycle entirely. Takes effect immediately.
refleksjon.interval_hint: How often Kåre checks Jang's thoughts. Minimum 1 minute. Default: 10 min.

storage.title: Image storage per user
storage.description: All images users send in and Kåre generates are stored in state/images/{user}/. Oldest images are automatically deleted when a limit is exceeded. Stored in configs/settings.yaml.
storage.count_hint: Input + output counted together. Oldest deleted when limit reached.
storage.mb_hint: Oldest images are also deleted if total size exceeds this limit.

usage.title: Usage per user
usage.description: Overview of stored image space. Updated when the page loads.

personality_mode.title: Core Personality
personality_mode.description: Choose the detail level for the core personality. Higher levels provide more context and better responses, but use more tokens.
personality_mode.minimal_desc: Name, language and 3 absolute rules only. ~80 tokens. For very resource-limited hardware.
personality_mode.letvekt_desc: Short version with core rules. Internal knowledge is tagged with [Internal knowledge – not verified]. ~150 tokens.
personality_mode.standard_desc: Full core personality with happy go lucky, three pillars and knowledge levels. Recommended. ~420 tokens.
personality_mode.full_desc: Standard + behavior rules (communication style, conversation progression, tool discipline). ~650 tokens.
personality_mode.komplett_desc: Full + self-image + world. The assistant's map of its own world is always injected. ~900 tokens.
personality_mode.egendefinert_desc: Write your own core personality. The default text is used as a starting point.
personality_mode.custom_hint: This text replaces the entire personality_core.md. personality_self.md (the assistant's self-image) is always injected in addition.
personality_mode.hot_reload_hint: The change takes effect immediately after saving (hot-reload).

selfimage.title: Kåre's self-image
selfimage.description: Kåre can write observations about itself to personality_self.md — a file that shapes who it is over time. Here you control which users can influence this self-image. Takes effect immediately.
selfimage.name_hint: The name the assistant introduces itself with. Injected into system prompt on hot-reload.
selfimage.hotword_hint: Activation word for voice commands. Note: changing this requires retraining the voice model.
selfimage.admin_note: The 'admin' system account is not shown here.

modes.all_desc: Any conversation can contribute to the self-image, regardless of who Kåre is talking to.
modes.selected_desc: Only conversations with the users you select below can shape the self-image.
modes.admin_only_desc: The self-image is only shaped in conversations with admin users.

frigate.title: Frigate
frigate.description: Camera analysis via Frigate NVR. Stored in configs/services.yaml.
frigate.timeout_hint: Max wait time per Frigate call
frigate.snap_hint: Max wait time for image download

plex.title: Plex
plex.description: Plex media server. Stored in configs/services.yaml and configs/plex.env.
plex.timeout_hint: Max wait time per Plex call
plex.token_warning: Service restart (kaare.service) required for new Plex token to activate.

profile.title: Distribution profile
profile.description: Choose which service bundle Kåre is installed with. Does not affect domains — those are configured separately below.
profile.hot_reload_hint: Recommended: run 'Hot-reload all config files' in the Maintenance tab after saving.

full.label: Full
full.description: All included: Jing+Jang, BGE-M3 embedding, wiki search, voice, agents.

medium.label: Medium
medium.description: Without Jing+Jang. BGE-M3 and wiki included. Voice and agents included.

letvekt.label: Lightweight
letvekt.description: Without Jing+Jang and wiki. Intent embedding only. Voice and agents included.

agenter.role_custom_placeholder: Write the role this agent should play in the meeting...
agenter.role_custom_hint: Custom text is used as the agent's instruction in the meeting system prompt.
agenter.role_hot_reload_hint: Changes take effect from the next meeting.

mechanic.label: Mechanic
mechanic.description: Technical assistant and problem solver. Used in dev meetings and for technical questions.

roles.undersøker_desc: Digs into the system using tools – fact-based and methodical. Default behaviour.
roles.kritiker_desc: Asks critical questions about Kåre's findings. No answers – only questions.
roles.analytiker_desc: Analyses patterns across meeting reports and history.
roles.egendefinert_desc: Write your own instruction for Mechanic's role in the meeting.

miss_kare.label: Miss Kåre
miss_kare.description: Evaluator – sits on the sideline and comments on the conversation. Can look up facts from Miss Library.

roles.empatisk_desc: Warm and caring – focus on the user's emotional life and human side. Default behaviour.
roles.analytiker_desc: Structured pattern recogniser – draws lines between observations.
roles.utfordrende_desc: Challenges assumptions about the user with open, critical questions.
roles.egendefinert_desc: Write your own instruction for Miss Kåre's role in the meeting.

miss_library.label: Miss Library
miss_library.description: Librarian and knowledge keeper. Web search is always on – local wiki requires the database to be downloaded.

tools.utforsk_desc: Read files, list directories and search code under /kaare.
tools.inspiser_desc: Read logs, check services and resources, show git diff/log.
tools.nettsøk_desc: Search the internet via the configured search provider.
tools.shell_desc: Run shell commands locally or on connected nodes. Enable only when needed.
tools.hukommelse_desc: Mechanic's personal memory – persists between meetings.
tools.spør_miss_library_desc: Allow Miss Kåre to fact-check with Miss Library during evaluation.
tools.wiki_desc: Local Wikipedia database (Qdrant). Requires the wiki_no collection to be downloaded.

bruker.title: Create first user
bruker.description: Add at least one user besides admin. You can also skip and do this later.

integrasjoner.title: Integrations
integrasjoner.description: Kåre works without all of these. Fill in what you have — or skip and configure via Settings → Integrations later.

ferdig.title: Kåre is ready!
ferdig.description: Basic setup complete. You can configure more via the Admin panel at any time.
hints: Add aliases for Norwegian HA entity names (Aliases in menu)
Configure speakers and media nodes (Nodes in menu)
Set up Plex token, camera settings and more in Settings

llm.title: LLM source
llm.description: Kåre needs access to a language model (LLM). Choose whether to use the built-in one or one you already have.
llm.builtin_hint: Recommended for beginners. Simple setup, everything included.
llm.builtin_warning: Downloads approx. 10 GB on first startup.
llm.builtin_note_body: The default .env.example has this configured. Run setup.sh to confirm the setup, then docker compose up -d.
llm.external_hint: You have Ollama, vLLM or a cloud API running elsewhere.
llm.external_url_hint: Compatible with Ollama and OpenAI API (vLLM, LM Studio, etc.)

hot_reload.title: Hot-reload config
hot_reload.description: Reloads YAML files in running processes — without restart. Covers: aliases, lang_normalize, capability_map, llm.yaml, models.yaml, services.yaml, settings.yaml, personality.
hot_reload.note: Note: MQTT connection, API keys (Brave/NVIDIA) and ha-log-bridge remain cached in RAM after hot-reload — these need service restart below.

health_check.title: System check
health_check.description: Checks imports, config files and that all services respond.

test_run.title: Test run
test_run.description: Runs automated tests against system logs and code.

services.title: Service restart
services.description: Restart one service after config changes not caught by hot-reload. Green dot = service is running.

kaare.label: Kåre (main API)
kaare.hint: Port 8000. Restart for new LLM settings and config.

gateway.label: HA Gateway
gateway.hint: Port 8002. Restart after HA URL/token change.

agents.label: Agents (Library + Mechanic)
agents.hint: Port 11450. Restart after LLM change for these roles.

embedding.label: Embedding (BGE-M3)
embedding.hint: Port 11446. Restart after embedding config change.

argus.label: Argus
argus.hint: Log daemon. Restart if log collection stops.

voice.label: Voice Bridge
voice.hint: Port 8011. STT/TTS. Restart after voice config change.

memory.title: Memory
memory.description: Force Kåre to compress short-term memory (STM) → long-term memory (LTM) now.

rollback.title: Reset to defaults
rollback.description: Restores all config files from the frozen factory defaults in configs_default/. Use this to start fresh with a clean installation.
rollback.confirm: This resets ALL config files to factory defaults. All custom settings, models and service URLs will be lost. Continue?
rollback.pin_warning: ⚠️ This resets all settings to factory defaults — as if freshly installed. All custom values will be lost. Recovery points are kept.

github.title: GitHub publishing
github.description: Kåre will be published on GitHub. Never hardcode usernames, place names, Home Assistant URL, API keys or timezone directly in code. All such values are stored in configs/settings.yaml or .env files that are not checked in.

hardware.title: Hardware
hardware.description: Detected CPU, RAM, GPU and NPU. Run setup.sh on the host for full detection.
hardware.note_gpu: GPU detected — enable by adding COMPOSE_FILE=docker-compose.yml:docker-compose.gpu.yml to .env and running setup.sh

snapshots.title: Recovery Points
snapshots.description: Save named snapshots of all config files and restore them when needed.
snapshots.max_reached: Maximum 10 reached — delete one to save a new snapshot
snapshots.restore_confirm: This will overwrite active config files with snapshot "{{name}}". Continue?
snapshots.import_description: Upload a previously exported config zip to restore it on a new installation.
snapshots.select_hint: Select a snapshot to install or download

login.title: Kåre
login.subtitle: Log in to continue
login.choose_pin_sub: Hi, {{name}}! You need to set a personal PIN before you continue.
login.error_pin_short: PIN must be at least 4 digits.

edit.title: Edit — {{name}}
edit.vpn_ai_only: AI only — AI chat externally, not smart home
edit.can_manage_child_timers_desc: Can set timers for children and teens

delete_modal.title: Delete user
delete_modal.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This cannot be undone.

vpn_modal.title: VPN — {{name}}
vpn_modal.scan_hint: Scan with WireGuard app — shown only now.

voice_modal.title: Voice — {{name}}
voice_modal.instruction_2: Read the sentences below loudly and clearly
voice_modal.instruction_3: Click «Stop» or wait for the timer to finish
voice_modal.error_mic: Error: Could not open microphone. Check that the browser has permission.
voice_modal.error_record: Recording failed. Try again or restart voice bridge.

tools.title: Tool permissions per role
tools.description: Control which tools Kåre can use per user role. Changes take effect immediately.
tools.always_included: Always included (Kåre's own): self-image, world, user profile, read_inner_thoughts, read_thought_history

user.error_pin_short: PIN must be at least 4 digits.

aliases.title: Aliases
aliases.description: Norwegian names Kåre recognises for Home Assistant devices and rooms. Changes take effect immediately.
aliases.card_description: Three sections: Aliases (text → entity_id), Rooms (room names → synonyms), Room entities (room → entity_id list).
aliases.hot_reload_note: Changes take effect immediately (hot-reload) — no restart required.

nodes.title: Nodes
nodes.card_description: Configuration of all TTS devices (Nest Hub, Chromecast, ESP32). Stored in configs/nodes.yaml.

tools.title: Tools
tools.ssh_local_sudo_warning: Local sudo gives Kåre full system access — not recommended
tools.ssh_ha_os_hint: Port 2222 and user root are locked automatically. HA CLI commands are always allowed.
tools.ssh_ha_host_hint: Found HA at {{host}} — read from service config

cameras.title: Camera settings
cameras.description: Choose which cameras and objects Kåre should analyse automatically.
cameras.global_off_hint: When off: Kåre does not automatically analyse any camera events.
cameras.storage_error_invalid: Invalid values. Snapshot: 0 or 100–10000 MB. Log: 0 or 10–1000 MB.

home.voice_disabled: Voice disabled (STT is turned off under Settings)
home.greeting: Hi! What can I help you with?
home.error: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
home.miss_kare_hint: Start with <0>Miss Kåre</0> to speak directly with her

reflections.empty_reflection_no_meetings: No reflection meetings yet. Use the Start button above or wait until 04:00.
reflections.empty_reflection_select: Select a meeting and enter the PIN to view its content.
reflections.topic_ph: Suggest a topic or focus point for the next meeting…
reflections.comment_ph: Add a comment to this meeting…
reflections.pin_subtitle: Enter {{username}}'s PIN to view the meeting
reflections.pin_error_short: PIN must be at least 4 characters
reflections.settings_leder_custom_ph: Write the meeting leader instructions here…

user_reflections.title: Reflection meetings
user_reflections.subtitle: Nightly conversations between Kåre and Miss Kåre about your day
user_reflections.select_reflection: Select a meeting on the left to read it
user_reflections.pin_hint: Enter your PIN to view the contents

user_settings.title: Settings
user_settings.subtitle: Customise the look and feel of Kåre for you
user_settings.accent_hint: Choose an accent colour for bubbles and buttons. × resets to role default.
user_settings.font_size_hint: Affects text size in chat bubbles and the input field
user_settings.animations_hint: Standard = bubble fade-in and glow effects. Minimal = clean and fast.
user_settings.tts_autoplay_hint: Automatically play Kåre's replies as audio after each message
user_settings.show_trace_hint: Show tool-call steps below Kåre's replies by default
user_settings.mk_panel_hint: Show Miss Kåre's side comments in a panel after conversations
user_settings.preview_user: This is how your messages look now
user_settings.preview_kare: And this is how Kåre replies to you

forklaringer.title: What is what in Kåre?
forklaringer.subtitle: Explanation of all pages and features — for users without a technical background

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.body: The dashboard shows the status for all running services. A green dot means OK, red means there's a problem. Press «Refresh» for the latest status.
dashboard.item_1: Green dot = service is responding normally
dashboard.item_2: Red dot = service is down or unreachable
dashboard.item_3: The model card shows the active AI model and latest response time
dashboard.item_4: The «Refresh» button fetches fresh status from all services

users.title: Users
users.body: Each family member has their own account with a role, PIN and individual permissions. The role determines what Kåre can help with.
users.roles_intro: The user role determines what Kåre can help with:

roles.child: Child — Limited to child-friendly content. No smart home control.
roles.teen: Teen — Internet access and more of Kåre, with some restrictions.
roles.young_adult: Young adult — Full access except admin functions.
roles.adult: Adult — Full access to all user features.
roles.admin: Admin — Controls the entire system, including settings and other users.

users.vpn_intro: VPN access level determines what the user can do from outside the home network:

vpn.local_only: Local only — VPN access is blocked for this user.
vpn.ai_only: Kåre only — Can chat via VPN, but cannot control smart home.
vpn.full_access: Full access — Can do everything via VPN, including smart home control.

users.tools_intro: Tools are actions Kåre can perform. Under Settings → Agent settings you choose what each role has access to:

tools.styr_enhet: Turn lights, heating and other HA devices on/off
tools.les_ha: Fetch status from sensors and devices in the smart home system
tools.get_weather: Fetch weather forecast for home location
tools.søk_nett: Search the internet via DuckDuckGo, SearXNG or Brave
tools.kare_image: Generate images with AI (FLUX via HuggingFace)
tools.media: Play music, radio and Plex content
tools.notat: Write and read notes in Kåre's notepad
tools.announce: Send voice announcements to speakers in the house
tools.reason_freely: Kåre thinks carefully through complex questions
tools.minne: Search and retrieve older conversations from long-term memory
tools.kamera: Take a photo from Frigate cameras and fetch motion events
tools.søk_i_argus: Search system log and event history
tools.utforsk_kode: Read files and code on the system (admin only)
tools.inspiser_system: Check services, logs and resource usage
tools.ssh_kommando: Run commands on other machines on the network
tools.local_kommando: Run commands directly on the AI PC

users.pin: PIN is a numeric code that protects the account. Used for login and to unlock private meeting minutes.
users.voice_reg: Voice registration lets Kåre recognise who is speaking. The user reads a few sentences and Kåre learns the voice profile.
users.vpn_qr: The VPN QR code contains all settings for connecting to the home network from outside. Scan it in the WireGuard app.
users.warning_delete: ⚠ Deleting a user is irreversible — all history and profile disappear permanently.
users.warning_vpn: ⚠ Deleting a VPN profile immediately removes external access for that user.

vedlikehold.title: Maintenance
vedlikehold.body: Maintenance gives you control over Kåre's runtime without the terminal.
vedlikehold.item_1: Hot-reload — updates aliases and settings without a restart. Kåre stays available the whole time.
vedlikehold.item_2: Full restart — restarts the Kåre service. Takes 5–30 seconds.
vedlikehold.item_3: System check — verifies that all services respond and connections work.
vedlikehold.item_4: Memory compression — transfers short-term memory (STM) to long-term memory (LTM). Runs automatically each night.
vedlikehold.item_5: Config snapshots — Create named backups of all settings, install or download as a zip file, import on a new install. ⚠ Factory reset restores everything to defaults — requires PIN confirmation.

verktoy.title: Tools
verktoy.summary: Insight into Kåre's tool usage and active timers
verktoy.body: The tools page provides insight into SSH nodes, timers and Kåre's action log. SSH connections to network machines are configured here.
verktoy.item_1: The timer overview shows active countdowns and reminders Kåre is tracking.
verktoy.item_2: The tool log shows the most recent actions Kåre has performed.
verktoy.item_3: You can see who asked for what, the timestamp, and whether it succeeded.

aliaser.title: Aliases
aliaser.summary: Norwegian names and synonyms for smart home devices
aliaser.body: Aliases let you speak naturally to Kåre. Instead of «light.living_room» you say «the living room light» and Kåre knows what you mean.
aliaser.item_1: Aliases — maps text to a HA entity ID (e.g. «the living room light» → «light.living_room»)
aliaser.item_2: Rooms — defines room names and synonyms (e.g. «lounge» = «living room»)
aliaser.item_3: Room entities — lists which devices belong to each room
aliaser.item_4: Changes take effect immediately (hot-reload) — no restart needed

noder.title: Nodes
noder.summary: Audio and display devices Kåre can speak through or show content on
noder.body: A «node» is a device Kåre can speak through, display content on, or stream music to. Nodes have capabilities: Audio (TTS/announcements) and/or Display (images/text/video).

types.ha_media_player: HA Media Player — Device controlled by Home Assistant (Nest Hub, Google TV, smart speaker via HA)
types.esp32: ESP32 — Custom microcontroller board with speaker
types.wyoming: Wyoming — Voice satellites with microphone in and audio out (HA Voice protocol)
types.chromecast: Chromecast — Google Chromecast or Google TV, direct connection
types.snapcast: Snapcast — Synchronised multiroom audio over the local network
types.airplay: AirPlay — Apple protocol for wireless audio (HomePod, Apple TV, AirPlay speakers)
types.dlna: DLNA — Standard for wireless audio to compatible TVs and stereos
types.apple_tv: Apple TV — AirPlay-based, supports display and audio
types.samsung_tv: Samsung TV — Tizen OS, controlled via HA or directly
types.android_tv: Android TV — generic Android TV platform
types.google_tv: Google TV — Google's TV platform (Chromecast Gen 4+)
types.fire_tv: Fire TV — Amazon's TV platform (FireStick, Fire TV Cube)
types.lg_tv: LG TV — webOS, controlled via Home Assistant

kameraer.title: Cameras
kameraer.item_1: Cameras are connected via the Frigate integration under Settings → Integrations.
kameraer.item_2: Confidence level — How certain Kåre must be about a detection (e.g. that it's a person) before reporting it. High = fewer false alarms.
kameraer.item_3: Storage limit — Maximum number of images and total size (MB) Kåre stores per user.
kameraer.item_4: Snapshot — Kåre takes an instant photo from a camera on request.
kameraer.item_5: Events — Kåre fetches motion events and object detection from Frigate.

agenter.title: Agent Messages
agenter.body: Kåre does not work alone. Several agents contribute behind the scenes. This page shows messages and thoughts they have shared — read-only.
agenter.miss_kare: Miss Kåre — Evaluates Kåre's responses in real time. Adds side comments and alerts Kåre to inaccuracies. Runs on the 9B model.
agenter.miss_library: Miss Library — A dusty librarian AI. Searches local Wikipedia and the internet when Kåre needs facts.
agenter.mechanic: Mechanic — A technical assistant Kåre can delegate tasks to. Thinks independently and delivers answers.
agenter.jing: Jing — Kåre's fast inner voice. Runs on the NUC machine, sends short thoughts.
agenter.jang: Jang — Kåre's deep, slow inner voice. Runs nightly reflections and sends longer thoughts.

refleksjoner.title: Reflections
refleksjoner.body: Kåre holds two meetings every night. It is his way of learning from the day and growing as an assistant.
refleksjoner.item_1: Reflection meeting (04:00) — Kåre and Miss Kåre review the day's conversations. Kåre updates his self-description and world model.
refleksjoner.item_2: Developer meeting (05:30) — Technical review of system health, errors and improvement suggestions.
refleksjoner.item_3: PIN protection — Meeting minutes are locked with the user's PIN. Only you can read your own minutes.
refleksjoner.item_4: Topic field — You can suggest a topic for Kåre to address in the next nightly meeting.
refleksjoner.item_5: Miss Kåre portrait — Miss Kåre gradually builds a personal portrait of each user based on observations over time. The portrait is injected into meeting context for more personal analysis.

innst_generelt.title: Settings → General
innst_generelt.item_1: Location — Home location used for weather, sunrise/sunset and geographic context. Stored locally.
innst_generelt.item_2: Time zone — Kåre uses this to understand time and date correctly.
innst_generelt.item_3: Language — Kåre's response language and GUI language. Choose between Norwegian, English and German.

innst_ha.title: Settings → Home Assistant
innst_ha.summary: Connection to the smart home hub
innst_ha.body: Home Assistant (HA) is the brain of the smart home system. Kåre uses HA to control lights, heating and sensors.
innst_ha.item_1: HA URL — The address of Home Assistant on the local network (e.g. http://192.168.0.100:8123).
innst_ha.item_2: Token — A one-time key you create in HA under Profile → Long-lived access tokens. Kåre uses this to authenticate.
innst_ha.item_3: Timeout — How long Kåre waits for a response from HA. Increase if the network is slow.

innst_mqtt.title: Settings → MQTT / VPN
innst_mqtt.summary: Message protocol and VPN access from outside
innst_mqtt.item_1: MQTT — Lightweight message protocol used by Frigate to send camera events to Kåre. Only needed if you use Frigate cameras.
innst_mqtt.item_2: MQTT broker — The server that relays MQTT messages. Usually the Mosquitto add-on in Home Assistant.
innst_mqtt.item_3: WireGuard VPN — Lets you use Kåre securely from outside your home network. Generate QR codes for users on the Users page.
innst_mqtt.item_4: DuckDNS — Free DNS service that gives your home a fixed domain name even if the IP address changes. Used by VPN.

innst_llm.title: Settings → LLM / Models
innst_llm.summary: Kåre's AI brain and supporting models
innst_llm.body: LLM (Large Language Model) is the AI model that makes Kåre intelligent. Here you configure which models are used for what.
innst_llm.role_kare: Kåre — The main model. Answers all questions. Runs locally on GPU.
innst_llm.role_miss_kare: Miss Kåre — The evaluator model. Checks Kåre's responses. Runs on a dedicated GPU.
innst_llm.role_library: Miss Library — The library model. Searches wiki and the internet.
innst_llm.role_mechanic: Mechanic — Technical assistant. Shares hardware with Miss Kåre.
innst_llm.role_fallback: Fallback — Used if the main model is unavailable.
innst_llm.role_sky: Cloud — Cloud-based model (DeepSeek) as a safety net when local capacity is full.
innst_llm.item_1: Whisper — The speech-to-text model. Converts your voice to text Kåre can understand.
innst_llm.item_2: Embedding — Creates searchable memory. Used for semantic memory search.
innst_llm.item_3: Local vs. cloud — Local models are faster and private. Cloud is a safety net if something fails.
innst_llm.item_4: num_ctx — The context window. How much of the conversation the model remembers in one run.
innst_llm.item_5: Piper (text-to-speech) — Kåre's voice. Three language sections (Norwegian/English/German) with different voice packs. Download, activate the desired voice and restart the service to apply it.

innst_refleksjon.title: Settings → Reflection
innst_refleksjon.item_1: Meeting leader style — The tone of the meetings: Standard, Strict, Exploratory or Custom.
innst_refleksjon.item_2: Enabled/Disabled — Temporarily turn off reflection meetings.
innst_refleksjon.item_3: Max rounds — Number of exchanges between Kåre and Miss Kåre per meeting.
innst_refleksjon.item_4: Jang interval — How often Jang sends thought messages to Kåre between meetings.

innst_nett.title: Settings → Web Search & Weather
innst_nett.summary: Search provider, weather and local sensors
innst_nett.item_1: Search provider — DuckDuckGo (default, no account), SearXNG (self-hosted) or Brave Search.
innst_nett.item_2: Weather provider — met.no, OpenWeatherMap, PirateWeather, WeatherAPI or local HA sensors.
innst_nett.item_3: Local HA sensors — Kåre can read indoor sensors (temperature, humidity) from Home Assistant.
innst_nett.item_4: Tide — Tide data from the Norwegian Mapping Authority (Norwegian coastal locations).
innst_nett.item_5: Trusted sources — Domains Kåre prefers and filters in web searches.

innst_bilder.title: Settings → Images
innst_bilder.item_1: Kåre can generate images with AI (FLUX model via HuggingFace).
innst_bilder.item_2: Storage limit per user — Maximum number of images and total size (MB).
innst_bilder.item_3: Images are stored locally and only visible to the user who requested them.
innst_bilder.item_4: Old images are deleted automatically when the limit is reached (oldest first).

innst_kare.title: Settings → Assistant Settings
innst_kare.item_1: Assistant name — What Kåre is called in your home. Default is «Kåre», but you can choose freely.
innst_kare.item_2: Hotword — The activation word Kåre listens for to start voice recognition.
innst_kare.item_3: Personality mode — Determines the depth and tone of Kåre's responses:
innst_kare.item_4: Minimal — Extra fast. Short and concise answers, almost no personality.
innst_kare.item_5: Lightweight — Balanced. Friendly and helpful, but not too long.
innst_kare.item_6: Standard — Full personality with humour, honesty and curiosity.
innst_kare.item_7: Complete — Uses all context: inner thoughts, self-image and world model.
innst_kare.item_8: Custom — You write Kåre's personality yourself.
innst_kare.item_9: Who influences Kåre — Choose which users can shape Kåre's personality through conversations.

innst_integrasjoner.title: Settings → Integrations
innst_integrasjoner.summary: Frigate camera NVR and Plex media server
innst_integrasjoner.item_1: Frigate — Camera NVR with AI detection. Kåre uses Frigate to take photos and fetch events.
innst_integrasjoner.item_2: Plex — Media server (NAS or PC). Kåre can search Plex and cast media to TV.
innst_integrasjoner.item_3: Plex token — Obtained from your Plex account and lets Kåre communicate with the server.

innst_distribusjon.title: Settings → Distribution
innst_distribusjon.item_1: Profile — Full (GPU + all services), Medium (limited GPU) or Lightweight (CPU only).
innst_distribusjon.item_2: The profile determines which services are available, but not which LLM provider you use.
innst_distribusjon.item_3: Domains — Kåre's local and external addresses (for VPN and reverse proxy).
innst_distribusjon.item_4: Services — Shows which background services (embedding, wiki, Qdrant) are enabled.

innst_agenter.title: Settings → Agent Settings
innst_agenter.summary: Configure Mechanic and Miss Kåre's permissions
innst_agenter.item_1: Mechanic — Choose which tools Mechanic can use on behalf of Kåre.
innst_agenter.item_2: Miss Kåre — Choose whether and how Miss Kåre participates in reflection meetings.
innst_agenter.item_3: Tool matrix — Adjust which tools are allowed per user role. Changes take effect immediately.

bruker_chat.title: Chat (Home page)
bruker_chat.item_1: Text field — Type your message and press Enter or the Send button.
bruker_chat.item_2: Voice button — Hold to speak. Kåre transcribes and responds by voice.
bruker_chat.item_3: Images — Drag and drop an image into the chat, or click the image icon to analyse it.
bruker_chat.item_4: Miss Kåre panel — Shown below Kåre's response with side comments and alternative perspectives.
bruker_chat.item_5: Trace view — Press the arrow below a response to see which tools Kåre used.
bruker_chat.item_6: Timer alerts — When a timer fires, the notification appears directly in chat without you needing to ask. Kåre confirms delivery automatically.

bruker_refleksjoner.title: My reflections
bruker_refleksjoner.summary: Personal meeting minutes from Kåre's nightly meetings
bruker_refleksjoner.item_1: Shows all reflection meetings where you were the topic.
bruker_refleksjoner.item_2: PIN protection — Enter your PIN to read the content. Only you have access.
bruker_refleksjoner.item_3: Meeting minutes are stored locally and never sent to third parties.
bruker_refleksjoner.item_4: PIN buffering — Kåre remembers your PIN within the same browser session so you do not need to enter it for each meeting.

noder_kategorier.title: Categories — AUDIO / MULTI / DISPLAY
noder_kategorier.item_1: AUDIO — Speaker only. Kåre speaks and plays music through the node.
noder_kategorier.item_2: MULTI — Speaker and display. Shows content and speaks (e.g. Nest Hub with screen, Google TV).
noder_kategorier.item_3: DISPLAY — Display only. Shows images, text and video. No direct TTS audio from the node.

verktoy_ssh.title: SSH nodes
verktoy_ssh.body: SSH nodes are machines on the network that Kåre can run commands on. Configure here, use via the «ssh_kommando» tool in chat.
verktoy_ssh.item_1: Node type: Linux/standard SSH (port 22, optional user) or HA OS (port 2222, root, only ha-commands allowed).
verktoy_ssh.item_2: Allow sudo — Enable per node and list exactly which sudo commands are permitted. Only listed commands are accepted.
verktoy_ssh.item_3: Test connection — Click the button to verify the SSH connection directly in the GUI.

verktoy_timer.title: Timer limits
verktoy_timer.item_1: Max active timers per user — Set the limit using the number field and the «Save» button. Default is 20.
